summary:
The statement claiming ROR-2 is unrelated to Systemic Lupus Erythematosus appears too absolutist; current understanding suggests its role may be understudied but potentially significant within the broad spectrum of genetic influences contributing to SLE. Therefore, option B cannot conclusively be deemed false based solely on existing data. To accurately answer "Which one isn’t correct?", additional clarification would help refine selection among options provided beyond binary affirmation/denial due to inherent complexity involved. Agent believes there are nuances worth exploring rather than making sweeping generalizations absent concrete disproofs specific enough across all aspects considered crucial here today.
